diagnosis: fp16 numerical instability on small dataset. Gradients underflowed to zero (train_loss=0) and generation overflowed to NaN during eval (eval_loss=nan). Model weights are likely corrupted — do not use this checkpoint.
fix_applied: Set fp16=False in train.py. fp16 speed gains are not worth the instability on datasets this small.
notes: train_loss=0 is not a good result — it means gradients vanished, not that the model learned perfectly.
eval_loss=nan confirms fp16 overflow during generation with predict_with_generate=True.
Improved data: 500 synthetic examples (up from 230), 7 scenario types, 5-8 summary variants each.
External AI4I dataset was loaded successfully this run.
